about.title: JavaScript Developer
about.description: I'm a JavaScript Developer with a passion for solving challenges. I enjoy working on projects that require technical thinking and creativity.

polyform.title: PolyForms
description: A Google Forms alike tool for creating forms and reviewing results. Designed with simplicity in mind.
Besides a sleek‑looking front end made in Angular, I also created an extensive API server in NestJS featuring data safety and type checking.

webflowrepo.title: Webflow repository
webflowrepo.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Webflow Library project
description: A simple gallery for user‑created  Webflow components. Features extensive filtering options, easy access management and a stylized design. Created using Firebase API and Angular.
Please contact me to obtain a login to the admin panel.

derry.title: Derry Virtual Guide
derry.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Derry Virtual Guide project
description: Virtual guide for the City of Derry created as part of an Erasmus project in Northern Ireland. I was involved in creating map of places described in the guide and managing site's API.
It gained a very positive acclaim from reviewers and local community.

timeline.title: Github Timeline
timeline.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Github Timeline project
description: A simple tool for visualizing a Github repository's activity. It allows you to see your activity in a timeline format, providing a quick overview of selected commit.

nocodelib.title: No‑Code components library
description: I participated in a creation of a service for pre‑created components for various no‑code platforms.

In the project, I was part of the team working on extensions for Webflow, Bubble.io and Figma. Using React and RxJS I connected those plugins to the service's API and ensured smooth user experience with filtering and searching for components.

adminpanel.title: Component service's admin panel
description: I created an admin panel for mentioned no‑code components library.

The panel is used by the service's employees to manage components and their metadata. It also provides the staff with a way to inspect statistics of the project and manage customers' accounts and subscriptions.

remotion-tiktoks.title: TikTok Generator in Remotion
description: Using Remotion - a React-based procedural video generator - I created an automated video generator that, based on images, sounds, and clips provided by the user, creates short TikToks with customizable text displayed in the footage.

highschool.title: Technical High School, IT specialist qualification

hyland.title: Frontend Web Developer
hyland.description: Building and maintaining enterprise‑grade SaaS applications using Angular and TypeScript. Working on cloud‑based solutions with focus on user experience, CI/CD pipelines, process automation and system architecture.

eternals.title: Freelance JavaScript Developer
eternals.company: The Eternals – Low Code / Automation / Webflow Agency
eternals.description: Developed front-end features, plugins and no‑code integrations for various platforms. Built solutions using React, Angular and Node.js while delivering marketing automation tools and SaaS components.

freelance.title: Freelance Web Developer
freelance.description: Created 4 fully fledged websites in WordPress and Joomla. Responsible for designing, building, customising and SEO‑optimising those sites. Also tested various cloud computing services including GCP.
